title: HAshim b. 'Utbah al-Mirgal and the "Night of Howling" The Raising of the Ma. aIif and the Call for Arbitration 'All Sends Ja'dah b. Hubayrah to KhurisAn
description: the "Night of Howling"288 According to Abu Mikhnaf-Abu Salamah: At evening HAshim b. 'Utbah al-Zuhr summoned the men: "Let anyone who seeks God and the next world come to me! " Many came to him, and he attacked the Syrians with a band of followers several times, but everywhere he attacked them they held firm against him and the fighting was fierce. He said to his men: "Do not let this steadfastness

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
